questions.prompt: A {JobTitle} field renders blank in a user's signature preview. Where does the value need to be set?
choices: In the synced directory (Microsoft Entra ID or Google Directory) or via the User Details Editor
Inside the Senders tab as a per-user override
In the Brand Kit as a brand asset
questions.explanation: Field elements pull per-user data from the synced directory at send time. Fix the directory record (or delegate via the User Details Editor); never hardcode user-specific values into the template.

questions.prompt: If the Senders tab has both a group rule and a list of individual addresses, only users in both sets get the signature.
questions.explanation: Senders rules are combined with OR, not AND. A user matched by either the group or the address list gets the signature. To exclude users, use the Exceptions tab.
